title: Arai Chaser X Gloss Black

specs.material: Multi-Directional Impact Protection System (MIPS) with Arai's proprietary EPS liner and ABS/Polycarbonate composite shell

technical_analysis: The Arai Chaser X utilizes a refined version of the brand's signature Multi-Directional Impact Protection System (MIPS), featuring an advanced low-friction slip plane that allows the helmet to rotate independently during oblique impacts, significantly reducing rotational forces transmitted to the brain. The shell construction employs a high-strength ABS/Polycarbonate composite engineered for optimal energy absorption while maintaining a sleek, aerodynamic profile suitable for both urban commuting and track days. Internal comfort is maximized through Arai's proprietary EPS liner technology, which offers superior impact attenuation compared to standard foams, paired with moisture-wicking padding that ensures long-term wearability without compromising safety standards.
marketing_description: Experience the perfect blend of style and performance with the Arai Chaser X in a striking Gloss Black finish. Designed for the modern rider who demands uncompromising safety without sacrificing aesthetics, this helmet features a timeless silhouette that commands attention on the road. The aggressive yet refined lines are complemented by premium detailing, making it an ideal choice for those who view their gear as an extension of their personal identity.
yoast_metadesc: Discover the Arai Chaser X Gloss Black: a full-face motorcycle helmet featuring MIPS technology, ECE 22.06 certification, and superior aerodynamics. Shop now for ultimate safety and style.
